name: RENAISSANCERE HOLDINGS LTD
business: RenaissanceRe is a global provider of reinsurance and insurance, offering property, casualty and specialty reinsurance and certain insurance solutions to customers through intermediaries. The company operates through two reportable segments: Property (catastrophe and other property reinsurance/insurance) and Casualty and Specialty (general casualty, professional liability, credit, and other specialty reinsurance/insurance). Its customers include insurance companies and reinsurers, and it also manages third-party capital through joint ventures and managed funds.

exposures.sentence: We provide property, casualty and specialty reinsurance and certain insurance solutions to customers, principally through intermediaries.
Other specialty (4) Includes accident and health, agriculture, aviation, construction, cyber, energy, marine, satellite and terrorism.
Credit (3) Includes financial guaranty, mortgage guaranty, political risk, surety and trade credit.

catalysts.event: Launch of Medici UCITS property catastrophe bond fund
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025 we launched Medici UCITS, a new Irish domiciled property catastrophe bond fund, a sub-fund of RenaissanceRe Medici ICAV.
